title: agrostis rupestris
intro: Agrostis rupestris, also known as mountain bent or rocky bentgrass, is a perennial grass species found in mountainous regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis rupestris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Agrostis rupestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
